name: Maya Action: Export Camera Alembic
description: Creates a Maya action to export one or more cameras as an Alembic (.abc) cache. Provide camera transform names (comma-separated). Chain multiple action nodes together via actions_in/actions_out, then feed the final actions_out into a Maya Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]

    abc_path = inputs.get('abc_path') or self.get_parameter('abc_path', '')
    camera_nodes = inputs.get('camera_nodes') or self.get_parameter('camera_nodes', '')
    frame_start = inputs.get('frame_start')
    if frame_start is None:
        frame_start = self.get_parameter('frame_start', 1)
    frame_end = inputs.get('frame_end')
    if frame_end is None:
        frame_end = self.get_parameter('frame_end', 100)

    action = {
        'type': 'export_camera_alembic',
        'abc_path': abc_path,
        'camera_nodes': camera_nodes,
        'frame_start': int(frame_start),
        'frame_end': int(frame_end)
    }

    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added export_camera_alembic action -> {abc_path} (frames {frame_start}-{frame_end})')

    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
